Developer · Builder

Hi, I’m Hamzah. I build with tech to make everyday work easier.

Full-stack developer. I build practical web apps—mostly Laravel, Django, and JavaScript— with an eye on clear workflows and maintainable code.

About

Full-stack developer focused on tools and workflows that save people time.

I enjoy building applications that make day-to-day work easier. I am self-taught, from early days tweaking Blogger templates through PHP, Java, and JavaScript, and now a lot of Python. Laravel and Django are my usual launchpads for shipping ideas.

Prefer email? hamzahjamad@gmail.com
